MAKER-X

AI-Powered Robotics · Summer 2026 · ShanghaiTech University
Summer 2026  ·  ShanghaiTech University

MAKER-X

School of Creativity & Art  ·  SIST  ·  Kedao College

You don't just build a robot — you conceive the idea, design its personality, build the electronics, and pitch it. Four weeks. One team. One product you own end-to-end.

你不只是在制造机器人——你要构思创意、设计个性、搭建电路，最终登台展示。

4 Weeks
12h Per Week
2–3 Students / Team
Pass / No Pass Grading

The Mission · 课程使命

Maker-X is an intensive 4-week project course where cross-disciplinary teams build AI-powered robotic companions from scratch — hardware, firmware, personality, and pitch. Instruction in Chinese & English.

01 ### Conceive Identify a real user and a genuine need. Define the personality and purpose of your robot before touching any hardware.

02 ### Design Shape, sound, language, expression — every detail of the robot’s soul. Prototype rapidly and iterate without fear.

03 ### Build Solder, code, 3D-print, and integrate. Electronics, firmware, enclosure — one complete, working product.

04 ### Pitch It ★ Present your product to real university guests. A working demo, a poster, a story — your public debut.

Course Objectives · 课程目标

Maker-X is about more than building a robot. It’s about becoming someone who can think, collaborate, and create at the intersection of technology and design.

🤝 Cross-discipline Collaboration

Work in teams spanning engineering, design, and beyond. Learn to communicate across disciplines and ship something greater than the sum of its parts.

🧠 Confidence with AI & LLMs

Go from curious to capable. You’ll integrate large language models into real hardware — learning to prompt, tune, and deploy AI as a core part of a product.

🎨 Design Thinking in Practice

Empathy, creativity, rapid prototyping, iteration, and communication — not as theory, but as daily practice. The product is the proof.

Who Should Join · 招生对象

🎓 All ShanghaiTech Students

The course is open to all students across all schools and majors. No prior experience or knowledge in programming, design, robotics, or AI is needed.

🌐 Diversified Teams

We organize groups where different skills and backgrounds complement each other — so every student can contribute meaningfully and learn most effectively.

Four-Week Schedule · 课程时间线

Week Theme Key Deliverable
🔵 Week 1 — Conceive User research · Concept selection · Personality brief Concept brief
🟣 Week 2 — Design Prototyping · Firmware · Form & character Working prototype
🟠 Week 3 — Build User testing · Refinement · 3D-print enclosure Integrated product
🟢 Week 4 — Pitch It ★ Demo day · Poster · Public pitch Presentation + demo

The course runs at 12 hours per week — enough time to go deep, not enough time to hesitate.

Ready to build something real?

准备好打造真实作品了吗？

Let us know you're interested in Summer 2026.
Include your school name, year, and name.
